error_signature: Could not find workflow with id
title: 404 error for webhook in production due to EXECUTIONS_MODE
symptom: When triggering a webhook in production, a 404 error occurs with the message 'Could not find workflow with id'. This happens despite the workflow functioning correctly in test mode.
not_this_if: Workflow is executed in test mode
root_cause: The error occurs because the EXECUTIONS_MODE parameter is set to QUEUE, which requires worker containers to process workflows. If no worker containers are available, the webhook cannot find the corresponding workflow, resulting in a 404 error.
fix_steps: Change the EXECUTIONS_MODE from QUEUE to REGULAR
Save the changes and restart n8n
agent_instruction: Change the EXECUTIONS_MODE to REGULAR in the n8n configuration settings.
